Life SupportKisah seorang wanita HIV-positif yang mempelajari pelajaran cinta dan kekuatan dengan membantu orang lain. The Legend of TarzanBertahun-tahun setelah Tarzan meninggalkan hutan, ia diundang kembali untuk bertugas sebagai utusan perdagangan Parlemen, tanpa menyadari bahwa ia adalah pion dalam rencana pembunuhan. Lady in the WaterCleveland Heep, seorang pengawas gedung apartemen, menyelamatkan seseorang yang ia kira adalah seorang wanita muda dari kolam renang yang ia rawat. Ketika ia mengetahui bahwa wanita itu sebenarnya adalah tokoh dari dongeng pengantar tidur yang sedang berusaha kembali ke rumahnya, ia bekerja sama dengan para penghuninya untuk melindungi teman barunya itu dari makhluk-makhluk yang bertekad untuk menahannya di dunia kita. Valley Of DreamsLocated in northwest New Mexico and known for its unique badland landscape is the Ah Shi Sle Pah Wilderness. The otherworldly rock formations and petrified wood make it a great destination for those who want to get away. We spent 5 hours wandering around the area, seeing virtually nobody and could have easily stayed longer and still not seen it all. If youre looking for an unusual and unforgettable adventure, this place is for you. A Little GameA young girl finding her way around the city and her own life through chess lessons. We spent 5 hours wandering around the area, seeing virtually nobody and could have easily stayed longer and still not seen it all. If youre looking for an unusual and unforgettable adventure, this place is for you. DreambuildersMinna, a young girl, misuses her newfound ability to create and control other peoples dreams to teach her bothersome stepsister a lesson. Atomic KidsA uranium prospector is eating a peanut butter sandwich in the desert where atom bomb tests are being done. He becomes radioactive, and helps the FBI break up an enemy spy ring. School Of Magical Animals 3Children with magical animal companions at Winterstein School experience adventures spanning a forest and fashion show, encountering a snobbish cat and vegan crocodile while navigating friendship and first love. If youre looking for an unusual and unforgettable adventure, this place is for you. Pokemon: Zoroark Master Of...A greedy, manipulative media mogul seeks to capture Celebi for nefarious purposes, using the shape-shifting Pokemon Zoroark to hunt it down. The Skeletons CompassA group of middle school friends go on the hunt for treasure after finding a skeleton in the woods. If youre looking for an unusual and unforgettable adventure, this place is for you. Dolfje WeerwolfjeA young adopted boy, Dolfje, turns into a werewolf at his 7th birthday. Supported by his bigger brother and chased by a mysterious organisation he has to find out how to live a normal life. Atomic KidsA uranium prospector is eating a peanut butter sandwich in the desert where atom bomb tests are being done. He becomes radioactive, and helps the FBI break up an enemy spy ring. SoxAn adorable dog comes into the lives of a new blended family having difficulty adjusting. Once the dogs special powers are discovered, the local dogcatcher and the Federal Bureau of Dog Investigation will stop at nothing to nab him. Dogtanian And The 3 MuskehoundsHe quickly befriends three musketeers (Porthos, Athos and Aramis), saving Juliette, a maid-in-waiting for Queen Anne of Austria. Atomic KidsA uranium prospector is eating a peanut butter sandwich in the desert where atom bomb tests are being done. He becomes radioactive, and helps the FBI break up an enemy spy ring. Angel With The Iron FistsA father whose daughter is killed by the Devil Girls Gang, goes in search of justice. Inside The Forbidden CityThe tale of two imperial concubines vying for the emperors favor. The Trail Of The Broken BladeA young aristocratic knight Li Yueh renounces his sword, identity and the woman he loves after going on the lam for assassinating a corrupt official responsible for his fathers demise. The Tiger And The WidowIn The Tiger and the Widow, Hui Ying-hung is somehow mixed up in a salt smuggling ring that stinks of missing persons and rotten dilemmas. Life GambleLIFE GAMBLE is the tale of a simple blacksmith (Kuo Chue) with extraordinary martial-arts skills who is entangled in a life-and-death struggle among swordsmen, thieves, con artists, a smooth dagger-slinger (Fu Sheng), a beautiful seductress (Lin Chen-chi) who can kill with her smile, a servant with a deadly whip, an assassin with a golden hairpin, an iron-fisted villain on a murderous rampage, a ruthless gambler with seemingly unlimited funds, and so many more. Call Of The SeaA young fisherman, Chin Hu is in love with his childhood friend Hsiao Yu. However, the only son of a town bully lusts after Hsiao Yus beauty and tries all possible ways to approach her. The Mirror And The LicheeThe curious title refers to two props that signal a happy beginning to what develops into a tragic love story between the scholar and a local beauty. Killers On WheelsTwo guys and their women constantly get harassed by a group of young motorcycle outlaws on a small island. The situation becomes deadly when one of them gets killed. The Twin BraceletsWhen two childhood friends in a remote community vow to live as sisters forever, the stage is set for a drama of tragic proportions when, years later, one leaves to get married. The KillerA disillusioned assassin accepts one last hit in hopes of using his earnings to restore the vision of a singer he accidentally blinded. The Scandalous WarlordGeneral Feng occupies the city of Shandong, and soldiers and civilians alike welcome him without knowing his tyrannical and lustful nature. The Invincible FistHere Lo Lieh (future international star of King Boxer) plays a dedicated chief constable for Tsang Chou village, who falls in love with the blind daughter of a bandit who is wreaking havoc. The Land Of Many PerfumesMonk Tang San Zang, Monkey, Pigsy and Sha Wu Jing find themselves in Womanland, where women give birth to baby girls by drinking the magical spring water. Invincible ShaolinThree North Shaolin teachers (Lu Feng, Chang Sheng, and Sun Chien) are called on by the Manchus to teach their soldiers and urged to challenge the current South Shaolin teachers. They defeat the South Shaolin teachers and, that night, the head general (Wang Lung Wei) kills the South Shaolin teachers and blames their deaths on the North Shaolin teachers. The South Shaolin master sends more of his pupils, who are killed accidentally by the North Shaolin teachers. He finally sends two more (Wei Pai and Lo Meng) of his students to train with old masters and trains one student (Kuo Chui) himself with the goal of finally defeating the North Shaolin experts. The DelinquentThis film is a coming-of-age tale of the lower-class Hong Kong teens in the 1960s. Wang is the title character, a hotheaded and rebellious teen who is tempted by the dark side. The New Shaolin BoxersInternational favorite Alexander Fu Sheng cemented his stardom in this, the fourth film in his esteemed directors Shaolin series. Fu gives both a great dramatic and kung-fu performance as an honorable carriage driver who finds love and death when he battles particularly homicidal street punks. Emperor Chien LungEmperor Chien Lung goes incognito to mix with his people and understand their needs. He encounters many strange things along the way, including being arrested and nearly beheaded. Who will save him? Magnificent WanderersMillionaire Chu Te-Sa (Chiang) invests his considerable wealth into the rebel movement who are intent on usurping the ruling Mongol powers. His goals are impeded by a lack of support though and the supposed allies he has made in the town are merely eager to get their hands on his money. During an attack where these craven comrades flee, Chu befriends three con-artists who relish the chance to show off their fighting skills. The trio subsequently agree to help Chu in his quest to end Mongol rule and hatch a plan to destroy a major munitions dump. Princess Iron FanThe Monkey King and his gang are confronted by the evil Princess Iron Fan, Madam White Bone and her two sexy sisters, plus a cast of fanciful characters. Return Of The Crazy BumpkinsSequel to the John Lo Mar/Chang Yang original finds immigrant Yeh Feng leaving jail to live with crooked uncle Wang Sha, but his girlfriend Ai Ti has married an abusive husband. King DrummerLing Yun plays the replacement hired for a popular band whose egotistic drummer quit to join a rival group. Puppy LoveThis is a story of adolescent playfulness and innocence lost. Two best friends grow up together, but rivalry intervenes when they discover boys! Death ValleyA hired killer unknowingly makes friends with the man hes been sent to assassinate. When The Clouds Roll ByA schizophrenic who refuses to believe her pilot lover was killed and believes his death to be a lie created to end their relationship. Flying Guillotine 2The emperors reign of terror expands. Heroic outlaw Ma Teng joins a squad of female rebels, whose leader is torn between family loyalties. Passing FlickersAn amusing insiders look at the Hong Kong film industry from Li Han Hsiang, recreating some of the eras funniest and most surreal stories ripped straight from the gossip. The Long ChaseYueh Hua stars as an assassin who flees after killing a hated prime minister, with Lo Lieh as the relentless imperial guard who pursues him to a remote village being terrorized by bandits. With his characteristic blunt and confident style, Hotman Paris explores various hot issues, social phenomena, and personal stories of celebrity guests and public figures. SiletSilet I Love LolantoSmall-time conman and mechanic Lolanto finds himself in trouble when he cheats gangster Yu Yan Tat out of his high-end sports car on a three-day loan, where new sparkplugs would have sufficed. UnbeatableFai, once a world champion in boxing, escapes to Macau from the loan sharks and unexpectedly encounters Qi, a young chap who is determined to win a boxing match. BewitchedAn actor tries to convince a lady to play Samantha in an adaptation of the classic TV series, but unbeknownst to him, she really is a witch! Prince CharmingChen Li Pin, the nerdy son of a business tycoon, and his friend seek love in Hawaii. Returning home in disappointment, they accidentally find themselves in a messy identity swap. Oily ManiacA frustrated young man afflicted with polio works as a paralegal for a corrupt lawyer. He gets passed onto him the technique for a strange power by a dying man, which turns him into an oil based superhero/villain. Legend Of The Fist: Chen ZhenThe year is 1917 and Chen Zhen, believed to be dead, returns to Shanghai under a false name. He joins a mob boss for info on the Japanese incl. a long kill list and at night fights the Japanese masked. Painted FaceAn action-thriller centered on a vampire-like woman who eats the skins and hearts of her lovers. Casino Tycoon 2Inspired by the story of Macau’s Casino King Stanley Ho, the movie traces his blood-splattered fight to the top from 1930s to 1960s. In 1941, a young graduate, Benny Ho, flees Hong Kong during the Japanese invasion and heads for Macau. Benny starts as a labourer but rises to the top of the city’s casino business with his courage, wisdom and diligence. ImpermanenceA series of strange events is happening in a peaceful village, including a corpse that is resurrected from its grave and ran away. As the villagers investigate, a villain dies and the village head also goes missing. Justice, My Foot!Chow stars as Sung, a lawyer who uses any means necessary to help his wealthy clients escape the law. Sung retires to the countryside when urged by his wife, but when Mrs Sung encounters a woman whose husbands death has been covered up by corrupted officials, Sung returns to the court for justice to be served. The Story Of My SonLi Tsu-liang is newly widowed and leading an impoverished life with two young sons. He attempts to make a fortune at the horse-racing track, but is subsequently entangled with the loan sharks. Kungfu StuntmenThe documentary highlights renowned Chinese Kung Fu masters in the film industry, showcasing Hong Kongs Kung Fu legacy over sixty years and capturing their daring lives. Zombie IslandJeff goes to a deserted and mysterious island with his friends hoping to seek out exciting adventures but turns out to be a horrifying journey as they get trapped and are attacked by the zombies! Gangster, The Cop, The DevilDetective Lin sets up a special unit to arrest the motorbike robber and the crime syndicate behind the thefts in Foshan. His pregnant wife is hit by a motorbike robber, leading him to uncover their revenge plan. When Fortune SmilesThe head of a rich family dies and in his will leaves his fortune to his daughter. His son is enraged and uses a rubbish collector who looks the same as his sister to steal the fortune. The Uncles son also wants a piece of the fortune and coerces a small time thief into stealing the will for his wild scheme. HeroMa Wing Jing and his older brother Ma Tai Chueng arrive in Shanghai to make their fortune. Be-friending a powerful mobster Wing Jing is given his nightclub in return for saving Tam Sei’s life. Unfortunately, another Gangster wants the territory a well. The Mighty Peking ManA greedy Hong Kong businessman hires a young hunter to capture a giant gorilla said to live deep in the Indian jungle. The hunter finds the ape, and living with it he finds a feral human female who has befriended the creature. Lets Make Laugh 2The cheating husband goes bankrupt, and his house is soon to be taken by the government. A security guard is assigned to guard it while the husband goes missing. However, only the mistress stays alone in the house. Will the lonely, handsome guard and the heartbroken mistress hook up? Fight Back To School 2Sing quits the force after getting demoted to traffic duties, while his partner is assigned a mission involving foreign terrorists threatening to bomb a school in Hong Kong, so Sing decides to help by going undercover at the same school. The Monkey Is BackStone Monkey, has given hope to a desperate little girl. But Stone Monkey is defeated in a battle with the three-eyed God of War, causing him to lose his power and falls into the mortal world. Endless LoveA young girl encounters a novelist in a bar and quickly falls in love with him. However, it turns out she has fallen into a trap set up by the novelist and his ex-girlfriend. Drunken MasterWong Fei-Hung is a mischievous, yet righteous young man, but after a series of incidents, his frustrated father has him disciplined by a master of drunken martial arts. The Case Of DisappearancesWhen Qing Cheng was a teenager, he was attacked by an unknown mutant monster and lost his family and memory. He was regarded by the villagers as an ominous person who would bring disaster. Ip ManDuring the Japanese invasion of China, a wealthy martial artist is forced to leave his home when his city is occupied. With little means of providing for themselves, Ip Man and the remaining members of the city must find a way to survive. Perfect GirlsChi will inherit his dying grandfathers fortune with one condition, he has to be married in a month, otherwise the money goes to his uncle, Robert. NezhaA former top team racing driver wants to prove himself in a race but accidentally hurts his teammate Lily. When an inexperienced virtual car racing champion joins the team, can they team up to regain teams glory? Cop Shop BabesIsland East Police Station headed by Madam Lui is known for its “Cop Shop Babes” as all the officers there are female. Two police officers, Beer and Satay, apply for an internal transfer to this station in order to approach the girls. It is at this time that the police receives a bomb threat – can they resolve the case? Shark BustersDuring the financial crisis, a vast majority of Hong Kong people experience difficulties in repaying debts. During this time, loan sharks use ruthless ways to force debtors to repay their loans and it is up to Officer Lee and his underground team to hunt down the head of this illegal organization. Love On DeliveryA delivery boy Yin wants to impress his dream girl Li, so he enrols in a martial arts course to learn strange moves. Being timid, Yin saves Li while wearing a Garfield mask but the credit is stolen by Karate Master, Liu. To prove himself and win Li back, Yin defeats Liu in the ring with his unique martial arts move Invincible Wind and Fire Spin. ogr7 A Bite Of China S4, Ep 3A Bite Of China S4, Ep 3 Another Me In The World, Ep 2China Global Television Network is committed to producing, distributing and broadcasting premium documentaries from around Apple Scent: Khorgos, Ep 2Journey across mountains and deserts to honor a pact made hand in hand, listen to the echoes of growth in this rising desert city and experience the evocative Apple Scent that has lingered through the years. Power LunchPower Lunch delves into the economy, markets, politics, real estate, media, technology and more. The show sits at the intersection of power and money. Closing BellExperts guide viewers through the most vital hour of the trading day and analyse how the markets are progressing, the factors moving the markets and the reactions of the investors. Closing Bell: OvertimeDuring “Closing Bell: Overtime,” Morgan Brennan and Jon Fortt take you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading, and Michael Santoli provides daily markets insights throughout the program. Fast Money“Fast Money” is America’s post-market show. Cleansing KalijodoCleansing Kalijodo is a documentary that tells the story of the transformation of Kalijodo, a former hub of nightlife and illegal activities in Jakarta, into a well-organized and community-friendly public space. With in-depth narration, the documentary explores the impact of this transformation on local residents and the vision to make Kalijodo a symbol of positive urban change. Love You Love You Not (IMC)A romantic comedy about Amira, an English tutor, who teaches English to Juki, a hot-tempered Betawi guy, so he can follow his girlfriend to America. Sang PencerahThe story follows K.H. Ahmad Dahlan, an Indonesian hero who fights to build Muhammadiyah, facing resistance from society as he challenges old views and inspires a new way of thinking. MangkujiwoA young woman is pulled into a chilling web of rituals, betrayal, and bloodlines connected to an ancient mirror. As dark forces awaken, the boundary between past and present begins to shatter. Pulau Hantu 2Dante is again trapped in Ghost Island. Alongside Nero, they struggle to get out from the island. Whilst trying to get out, they meet 9 people who are making a rave party on the island. Cas Cis CusAstris mother demands angrily for a porn-video cassette that embarrasses the son-in-law Dedi, and the two grandchildren. In desperation, she runs away from home. Pulau HantuEight teenagers are set to sail for a holiday. However, the yacht has to leave them in a private small island with a single resort. The island keeps a ghostly secret that starts to prey their lives one by one. GaneshaGanesha tries to make his fortune in the city under influence of his friends. On the way, he managed to thwart a hijacking on the bus he was riding. The driver thanked him and raised him as his child. Menggapai Matahari 2This sequel of Menggapai Matahari continues the rivalry between Rhoma Irama and Beny Compo. Not only want to destroy Rhoma Iramas music career, Beny also want to physically harm him. Dunia MerekaFor Filly, the guitar substitutes for her mother who was killed in a plane crash. Her talent and taste in music makes her joined the band Capung Biru and met Ivan Bramono. Mencari HilalMahmud, a devoted elder, longs to revive a fading tradition to prove faith is not about wealth. His path collides with his estranged son, sparking an unexpected journey of belief, ideals, and reconciliation. Si Manis Jembatan AncolMaryam, a woman who are looking for happiness when her love life with Roy is in the verge of destruction. The presence of Yudha are able to make Maryam calm. But, a tragedy happened. Lutung KasarungGuruminda wants a wife who is as beautiful as his mother, but he is cursed by his own mother to become Lutung Kasarung, who will turn into a human again, when there is a woman who loves him. Membakar MatahariYanti married by Rachman and receives martial arts lesson from his grandfather to take revenge on the robbers and the pimp who trapped her in prostitution. Cewek GokilKeke works very hard in order to buy a Mini Cooper, the car of her dream. However, her hard work is causing some distance between herself and the people she loves. NazarCindy vows to marry Jajat, a geeky ketoprak seller who happens to pass by, if she wins a luxury car from the bottle cap lottery. Then Cindy really wins the luxury car but is now desperate to cancel her impulsive vow. 5 Cowok Jagoan (IMC)5 lifelong friends attempt to rescue a damsel in distress from gangsters and zombies in this action packed comedy. Cowok Bikin PusingThis movie tells the story about a pair of young love who once hurt by their former lovers. They finally fall in love and must overcome obstacles threatening their relationship. SoekarnoFrom fragile beginnings to fiery orations, a man named Soekarno rises with an unshakable spirit. Love, sacrifice, and bold visions shape his journey, as destiny pushes him closer to a nation’s long-awaited awakening. Pulau Hantu 3Madara Island has reopened with a new owner and the island soon becomes a popular destination for young vacationers. However, people begin to disappear and Nero must set out to find out what is going on. Kanan Kiri OK 2Silly things start to happen when Tati is determined to be a movie star after learning that Anita and Rio, her neighbours, are about to star in a movie. Giliran Saya ManaA young couple decided to elope because the womans parents only want their child to marry a rich person. The problem started when they decided to pretend to be rich and borrowed a luxury house from their friend. Nada-Nada RinduRamlan envies Rhomas success and tries to sabotage his career. Rhomas career is shattered, forcing him to start all over again. KangenTwo lovebirds separated by fate, and has to deal with a heartbreaking feeling of longing for each other. Love You Love You NotA romantic comedy about Amira, an English tutor, who teaches English to Juki, a hot-tempered Betawi guy, so he can follow his girlfriend to America. Sang PencerahThe story follows K.H. Ahmad Dahlan, an Indonesian hero who fights to build Muhammadiyah, facing resistance from society as he challenges old views and inspires a new way of thinking. MangkujiwoA young woman is pulled into a chilling web of rituals, betrayal, and bloodlines connected to an ancient mirror. As dark forces awaken, the boundary between past and present begins to shatter. Baby BluesTaking care a baby is not an easy work for Andika and Dinda. It makes Dinda experiences baby blues syndrome. Debates and quarrels happen. Finally, a miracle happens and their bodies are switched. The MarsupilamisThe legendary Marsupilamis swap the wild Palombian jungle for an even wilder place: the city. There, twins Jade and Mica find their world turned upside down when their explorer parents entrust them with three mysterious Marsupilami eggs. Once they hatch, the siblings must get creative to keep their new friends hidden after all, no one knows these energetic creatures exist, and predators could be lurking around every corner. Heartwarming Stories: ReunionThe story follows a group of old friends who reunite after many years apart. Each of them has lived a different life, carrying personal stories, unresolved wounds, and memories from the past. HomesteadAmid chaos, ex-Green Beret joins prepper compound; love grows, truths arise, and a community unites. 10 Days With DadAntoine is the Head of HR of a big company. When his wife decides to go on holiday and leave him with the responsibility of their four kids, he knows it will be easy. Dark Corners: The StalkerSusan lives a seemingly normal life but begins experiencing recurring nightmares about a serial killer stalking her. In these dreams, she exists as another woman named Karen, a mortuary assistant hunted by a mysterious “stalker.” SynchronicityA physicist who invents a time machine must travel back to the past to uncover the truth about his creation and the woman who is trying to steal it. HollywooFrench voice artist Jeanne dubs American actress Jennifer in a hit TV series. But when she blows a fuse and retires Jeannes world comes crashing down. A Snow Globe ChristmasA cynical TV exec looks at the perfect town inside a Christmas globe and is magically transported to it. When she wakes up in a perfect snow-covered town, married to a local woodsman, she discovers its not all just a fantasy. Dark Corners: The StalkerSusan lives a seemingly normal life but begins experiencing recurring nightmares about a serial killer stalking her. In these dreams, she exists as another woman named Karen, a mortuary assistant hunted by a mysterious “stalker.” Hotel NormandyWhen two people who no longer believe in love find each other, nothing can get in the way of their blossoming romance - except for a playful farce of miscues, meddling, and mistaken identity. Heartwarming Stories: ReunionThe story follows a group of old friends who reunite after many years apart. Each of them has lived a different life, carrying personal stories, unresolved wounds, and memories from the past. Cowboy And IndianaA champion bull rider struggles with addiction. Northern BordersNorthern Borders tells the story of ten year-old Austen Kittredge who is sent by his father to live on his grandparents Vermont farm, where he experiences wild adventures and uncovers long-festering family secrets. Its 1956 and Austen experiences the farm as a place full of eccentric people, especially his stubborn grandparents whose thorny marriage is known as the Forty Years War. Initially feeling stuck in this fractured household, young Austen plans a quick exit but ends up stranded with no choice but to navigate and endure. A humorous and sometimes startling coming-of-age-story, Northern Borders evokes Vermonts wildness, its sublime beauty, a haunted past, and an aura of enchantment. The Mummy (1999)In ancient Egypt, a forbidden love sparks a deadly betrayal that seals a priest in a cursed tomb. Decades later in 1926, explorers uncover the site and accidentally revive him, forcing them to fight an ancient evil rising again in the desert. Mortal Engines (Studio Universal)In a post-apocalyptic world where cities ride on wheels and consume each other to survive, two people meet in London and try to stop a conspiracy. MadagascarA group of animals who have spent all their life in a New York zoo end up in the jungles of Madagascar, and must adjust to living in the wild.
